comment: Cross-impl vector (infra#16). Generated by this repo's signEnvelope (src/oauth/envelope.ts) with tenantKey = HKDF-SHA256(master, salt=tid, info='mcp-authorizer/v1', L=32). The platform signEnvelope MUST reproduce this wire byte-for-byte; the authorizer's verifyAssertion (NimbleBrainInc/infra mcp-authorizer) MUST accept it. An identical copy lives in the infra repo. Drift in HKDF info, MAC framing, payload shape, or the lifetime cap breaks one side and fails CI. Regenerate intentionally only if the wire format version bumps.
